subcodes.title: Words to Nabil-i-A'zam around 1889
subcodes.first_line: We had sought shelter in the house of My uncle, Mirza Isma'il. Tihran was in the throes of the wildest excitement.
subcodes.subjects: @youth and pre-ministry of Abdu'l-Baha, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
